data.title: NorthWestern Energy to host year-end 2025 financial results webinar on Feb 12, 2026 at 3:30 PM Eastern. News release on Feb 11. Register at https://northwesternenergy.com/e.
data.description: NorthWestern Energy Group, Inc., known as NorthWestern Energy (Nasdaq: NWE), will be holding an investor webinar on February 12, 2026, at 3:30 p.m. Eastern time to discuss its financial performance for the year ending December 31, 2025. The company will release its financial results on the evening of February 11, 2026. To participate in the webinar, individuals can register at the following link: https://northwesternenergy.com/e.

data.title: MarkLines released Gen-AI (Beta), offering instant insights from its database via natural-language for automotive B2B users.
data.description: In Tokyo, MarkLines has unveiled Gen-AI (Beta), a new tool that provides instant insights to automotive B2B users through natural-language queries. This technology allows users to access information from the company's trusted database quickly and efficiently.

data.title: Anthropic introduces Claude for healthcare, featuring HIPAA-compliant AI tools and connections to CMS, Medidata, ClinicalTrials.gov.
data.description: Anthropic has introduced a new product called Claude for Healthcare, which is designed specifically for the healthcare industry. This product includes a HIPAA-compliant infrastructure to ensure the security of patient data. Additionally, it features new connectors for life sciences to key platforms such as CMS, Medidata, and ClinicalTrials.gov. This development aims to streamline processes and improve efficiency within the healthcare sector.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures show Broadcom, Nvidia, Palantir, Tesla, Walmart as key movers. CPI inflation report due next.
data.description: On Monday, significant movement was observed in Dow Jones Futures with key players including Broadcom, Nvidia, Palantir, Tesla, and Walmart. Awaiting investors on Tuesday is the Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation report. Noteworthy movers were Nvidia, Tesla, and Walmart among others. The CPI inflation report is anticipated to provide crucial insights for investors navigating the market.

data.title: Nasdaq outperforms Dow and S&P 500. Alphabet surpasses $4 trillion market cap. Dow, S&P 500 close at highs.
data.description: The Nasdaq composite performed better than both the Dow and the S&P 500 in the latest market updates. Alphabet's market capitalization surpassed $4 trillion. The Dow and S&P 500 closed at highs recently. Alphabet achieved the significant milestone of hitting a $4 trillion market cap. This recent development was covered live without specifically mentioning the source.
